details.productUrlName: Aggressive Biomancy Extended Art Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description: Create X tokens that are copies of target creature you control, except they have "When this creature enters the battlefield, it fights up to one target creature you don't control."
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"I am an esteemed scientist. Base violence is beneath me. Luckily, it's not beneath my subjects."
—Gulistan, Simic biomancer
